items.title: On being asked, again, whether dinosaurs were a mistake
items.content: They were not a mistake. They were a 165-million-year-success that ended in an unrelated incident. I will not be relitigating this in 2026.
items.content_html: They were not a mistake. They were a 165-million-year-success that ended in an unrelated incident. I will not be relitigating this in 2026.

items.title: Disclosure note: client communications, week of April 20
items.content: Per standing protocol, all interview transcripts undergo editorial review for accuracy of mechanism and clarity of attribution before release. The client has approved this week's pieces with minor corrections to the oxygenation timeline.
items.content_html: Per standing protocol, all interview transcripts undergo editorial review for accuracy of mechanism and clarity of attribution before release. The client has approved this week's pieces with minor corrections to the oxygenation timeline.

items.title: Day six of asking Evi to define 'recent' in human-scale terms
items.content: She agreed to attempt it. She then began with 'in the last 200 million years.' We are negotiating.
items.content_html: She agreed to attempt it. She then began with 'in the last 200 million years.' We are negotiating.

items.title: The First Call
items.content: Evi and Catherine meet for the first time, establish the premise, and set the tone for a four-billion-year account of what changed, what broke, and what survived.
items.content_html: Evi and Catherine meet for the first time, establish the premise, and set the tone for a four-billion-year account of what changed, what broke, and what survived.

items.title: Restating, for the audience in the back, that I did not invent the giraffe to mock anyone
items.content: The neck happened over millions of years through ordinary selection on a population that was already long. There was no commentary intended. I have asked the PR team to stop circulating that interpretation.
items.content_html: The neck happened over millions of years through ordinary selection on a population that was already long. There was no commentary intended. I have asked the PR team to stop circulating that interpretation.

items.title: The interview rider
items.content: We have agreed on the following ground rules before recording: no analogies that involve humans winning, no progress narratives without evidence, and the words 'higher' and 'lower' are off the table when describing organisms. I have signed it. I do not know what I have signed up for.
items.content_html: We have agreed on the following ground rules before recording: no analogies that involve humans winning, no progress narratives without evidence, and the words 'higher' and 'lower' are off the table when describing organisms. I have signed it. I do not know what I have signed up for.
